description: Complete the FAA Wildlife Strike Risk Analysis in /home/ga/Documents/wildlife_strikes.xlsx. In the 'Strikes' sheet, populate a 'State' column (H) by referencing the 'Airports' sheet for the State associated with each Airport_Code. Add a 'Total_Cost' column (I) summing Repair_Cost and Other_Cost, and a 'Major_Incident' column (J) that indicates 'Yes' if Total_Cost is greater than 50,000 or Damage_Level is 'Substantial', and 'No' otherwise. In the 'Summary' sheet, calculate the 'Total_Strikes', 'Total_Cost', and 'Major_Incidents' for each State listed in column A using the data from the 'Strikes' sheet. Apply currency formatting to the Total_Cost columns in both sheets and save the workbook.
